meaning: v.在(票据)背面签名,签注(文件),认可,签署
examples: Liu isn't ready to endorse the habit of sleeping less and making up for it later.
Still, Liu isn't ready to endorse the habit of sleeping less and making up for it later.
The other critical policy that needs to be in place is one the UK has refused to endorse.
Instead of a fair system of taxation with representation, Americans increasingly endorse greater representation without taxation.
